title: Selecting a Data Repository
author: Smith, Plato
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is 3 of 6 webinars scheduled for Fall 2021 for UF researchers. This presentation provides some basic introduction in selecting a data repository, a couple of actual examples for assisting UF researchers in selecting a discipline-specific repositories from real DMP consultations, and two general data repositories approved by the University of Florida Integrated Risk Management (IRM) Fast Path Solutions for open data assets.
steps_raw: This is 3 of 6 webinars scheduled for Fall 2021 for UF researchers. This presentation provides some basic introduction in selecting a data repository, a couple of actual examples for assisting UF researchers in selecting a discipline-specific repositories from real DMP consultations, and two general data repositories approved by the University of Florida Integrated Risk Management (IRM) Fast Path Solutions for open data assets.
